Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft Navigators Insurance Company'S Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David J. Garthe, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Virginia Surety Co.
Alison E. Greene, Esq., for Defendant and Opposing party: Navigators Insurance Co.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendants Virginia Surety Insurance Company's and Defendant Richter & Ratner Contracting Corporation's Motion To Compel Defendant Navigators Insurance Company's Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, is granted. Defendant Navigators Insurance Company's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Defendant Navigators Insurance Company's is ordered to respond and to produce further within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendants Virginia Surety Insurance Company's requests for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
